data.title: Tesla will discontinue the Model S, an electric pioneer from 2012, along with the Model X, announces Elon Musk.
data.description: The CEO of the company announced that they will discontinue production of the electric car, which was introduced in 2012 and the Model X.

data.title: Traders are split on Bitcoin's future, with 50% chance of $69K drop or $100K recovery. Myriad sentiment turns bearish.
data.description: Traders have turned bearish on Bitcoin sentiment on the Myriad platform for the first time in over two months. This shift comes as traders anticipate further downward movement amidst concerns over market shutdowns and heightened volatility. This change in sentiment suggests a negative outlook on Bitcoin's performance in the near future.

data.title: Regeneron's Eylea sales decreased by 28% to $1.08 billion in Q4 amid rising competition. Plans to build a $2 billion new factory.
data.description: Pharmaceutical company Regeneron (NASDAQ: REGN) announced Q4 adjusted earnings of $11.44 per share, a 5% decrease from the previous year, surpassing the expected $10.71 per share. Sales for the quarter were $3.88 billion, a 3% increase year-over-year, exceeding the anticipated $3.79 billion. U.S. net sales for Eylea HD and Eylea saw a 28% drop to $1.08 billion, with Eylea HD contributing $506 million and Eylea $577 million. The decrease in Eylea product sales was due to competitive pressures, market share loss to compounded bevacizumab, patient affordability issues, a shift to Eylea HD, and lower pricing. In Nov 2025, the FDA approved Eylea HD (aflibercept) Injection 8 mg.

data.title: Mastercard beats expectations with 14% organic revenue growth in 1Q, helped by government grants. Price target cut to $655.
data.description: Mastercard Inc (NYSE: MA) exceeded expectations with a 14% organic revenue growth and reported earnings of $4.76 per share, surpassing the consensus of $4.25 per share. Analyst Tien-tsin Huang maintained a Buy rating but lowered the price target from $685 to $655. The earnings beat was partly attributed to government grants. The company's organic revenue growth of around 14% exceeded guidance. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Founder sues exotic car auction executives for fabricating documents, diverting millions, and overcharging $11,515 for termination plan. Filed in New York Supreme Court.
data.description: Managers have been accused of creating a fake operating agreement, misusing millions in revenue, and charging the founder's company over $11,515 for strategizing his termination months prior. The incident took place in Stanfordville, N.Y., as reported on Jan. 30, 2026. The founder of the existing PCARMARKET was the victim of this alleged scheme.

data.title: Former Ambassador Marc Ostfield appointed as Colin Powell School Dean at CCNY. Exciting role starting January 30, 2026.
data.description: In New York on January 30, 2026, Marc Ostfield was announced as the latest Dean of the Colin Powell School for Civic and Global Leadership at The City College of New York. Ostfield, a notable executive, scholar, educator, and diplomat, has assumed the position previously held by Richard J. Henley and Susan L. Davis. This transition marks a significant change for the institution, with Ostfield bringing his diverse expertise to guide the school's direction. His appointment reflects a new chapter for the school, with high hopes for continued growth and success under his leadership.

data.title: PMB and Abrazo Health open 46,000 sq ft medical building and inpatient rehab facility in Goodyear, Arizona.
data.description: A healthcare facility spanning 46,000 square feet with 24 beds offers outpatient medical services for the community and inpatient rehabilitation in Goodyear, Arizona and San Diego. On January 30, 2026, PMB, a prominent healthcare real estate developer, partnered with Abrazo Health to establish this facility.

data.title: Bybit and Block Scholes report shows short-term crypto volatility spike as markets repriced Fed outlook. Bybit is world's second-largest exchange by trading volume.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on January 30, 2026, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume, unveiled its newest Bybit x Block Scholes Crypto Derivatives Analytics report. The report delves into recent market turbulence experienced by digital assets as investors reevaluate their expectations.

data.title: NSFOCUS named 'Stars Companies' in DDoS Protection market on MarketsandMarkets' 360Quadrant as of Jan. 30, 2026.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on January 30, 2026, NSFOCUS is revolutionizing DDoS Protection and Mitigation Security by offering automated solutions. The company has achieved recognition as one of the top companies in the DDoS Protection and Mitigation Security market, specifically being acknowledged as a 'Stars Company' by MarketsandMarkets.

data.title: Inventor from Westland, Mich., invents new BUG B GONE to kill roaches, scorpions with one spray.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 30, 2026, an inventor from Westland, Michigan shared a new invention called BUG B GONE. The inventor explained the motivation behind creating this product as a solution for homeowners to eliminate roaches, scorpions, and other bugs with a single application. The innovative design aims to offer simplicity and effectiveness in pest control, providing a convenient solution for protecting homes.

data.title: Federal Signal (NYSE: FSS) to announce Q4 earnings on Feb 25, 2026. Leading in safety solutions.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, in Downers Grove, Illinois, Federal Signal Corporation (NYSE: FSS), a renowned provider of environmental and safety solutions, is set to reveal its fourth-quarter earnings on February 25, 2026, before the market opens. This update coincides with the Company's plans to conduct an investor briefing.

data.title: PMMI launches SMB FastTrack Program to support small and medium-sized manufacturers with tailored resources at PACK EXPO East 2026.
data.description: A newly launched initiative, PACK EXPO East 2026 aims to simplify small and medium-sized businesses’ (SMBs) access to technology, education, and business resources. The program, named SMB FastTrack, is tailored to SMBs and was unveiled in Herndon, Va., on Jan. 30, 2026. This program is geared towards aiding SMBs efficiently in locating solutions and resources beneficial to their growth.

data.title: IL Fund settles debts with final draw of housing bonds in mid-October 2025, to be paid by 15 December 2025.
data.description: In mid-October 2025, the IL Fund disclosed an extra withdrawal, marking the ultimate draw of all housing bonds. This payment is slated for December 15, 2025.
